name: Dorothy Fatunmbi
technical_background: Basic Tech Literacy — comfortable with technology and tools but does not code. Curious Explorer who has tried ChatGPT and similar tools a few times.

current_profile.summary: Education professional focused on teaching, training, and instructional design. Has tried ChatGPT, Claude, and Google Gemini a few times but has not integrated AI tools into daily workflows. Comfortable with technology but has no coding experience. Interested in using AI for learning & development — specifically creating training materials and learning new skills faster.
technical_skills: Basic AI tool usage (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini)
current_profile.ai_experience: Curious Explorer — has tried ChatGPT, Claude, and Google Gemini a few times for basic tasks. Has not used AI systematically for instructional design, content creation, or training delivery. No experience with prompt engineering, AI agents, or evaluating AI-generated educational content.

learning_intent: Wants to use AI for Learning & Development — specifically to create training materials and learn new skills faster. Interested in integrating AI tools into education and instructional design workflows.

expected_skill_gaps.description: Needs prompt engineering fundamentals for creating educational content with AI.
Needs foundational AI understanding to evaluate and use AI tools effectively.
Needs evaluation skills to assess AI-generated educational content quality.
Needs AI governance awareness for responsible use of AI in education.
Needs to learn AI tools beyond basic ChatGPT usage for educational workflows.
